/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto=thin -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/pipeline_benchmarks.dir/benchmarks/benchmark_pipeline.cpp.o -o pipeline_benchmarks  _deps/benchmark-build/src/libbenchmark.a _deps/benchmark-build/src/libbenchmark_main.a libtracy_client.a -framework CoreFoundation _deps/benchmark-build/src/libbenchmark.a
